requests.decision_answered: Determine whether the deterministic top-ranked SPY Continuation contract has any setup-time-safe quote at or before the signal that can pass contract selection and feed execution/context calculators.
requests.missing_data_behavior: If no at-or-before-signal quote exists, contract selection remains abstain with quote_ts_event_after_signal or top_ranked_contract_failed_no_fallback; execution remains unknown and complete caution remains unknown.
requests.why_narrower_request_is_insufficient: The local ten-minute file starts too close to the signal and contains only a post-signal top-contract quote. The minimum narrower useful request is the deterministic raw symbol from regular-session open through the signal; broader symbols, alternate strikes, later exit-path data, and GLD/IWM are excluded.

requests.decision_answered: Determine setup-time trade volume through signal for the deterministic top-ranked SPY Continuation contract if the quote request finds a setup-time-safe quote.
requests.missing_data_behavior: If setup-time trade volume remains below 1, contract selection abstains and execution/complete caution remain unknown.
requests.why_narrower_request_is_insufficient: The existing local trade row for the top contract is aligned with the post-signal TCBBO row and carries zero setup-time-safe volume. Open-to-signal selected raw-symbol trades are the smallest request that can answer the volume gate without broadening contracts or dates.

not_requested.reason: Local setup-time-safe quote already proves the deterministic top-ranked contract fails the spread gate; no conditional exit request is allowed because no valid entry can be established.
